articles.description: Leeds beat Manchester United at Old Trafford in the league for the first time since 1981 to boost their Premier League survival hopes.
articles.title: Man Utd 1-2 Leeds United - visitors move six points clear of relegation zone

articles.description: A monumental victory over Manchester United at Old Trafford has given Leeds United a priceless lifeline in their quest for Premier League survival.
articles.title: Leeds United: What does their win against Manchester United mean in Premier League relegation battle?

articles.description: Manchester United defender Lisandro Martinez is sent off after 56 minutes for pulling the hair of Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin at Old Trafford.
articles.title: Lisandro Martinez: Manchester Utd defender sent off for hair-pull on Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin

articles.description: After retaining his Masters title, Rory McIlroy spent four hours dealing with presentations and interviews but was still smiling for the final one, writes Iain Carter.
articles.title: Masters champion Rory McIlroy makes major warning after second Augusta win

articles.description: England were "feckless, reckless and legless" on their dismal Ashes tour of Australia, according to the editor of the prestigious Wisden Almanack.
articles.title: Wisden editor gives scathing assessment of England Ashes defeat

articles.description: Tottenham captain Cristian Romero is set to miss the rest of the season with the knee injury he sustained in their 1-0 defeat at Sunderland.
articles.title: Cristian Romero: Tottenham captain out for season with knee injury as Premier League survival hopes hit

articles.description: Liverpool boss Arne Slot on why his side believe they can overcome a two-goal deficit against reigning champions Paris St-Germain in the Champions League on Tuesday.
articles.title: Liverpool v PSG: Reds can do special things against PSG in Champions League says Arne Slot

articles.description: Paris-Roubaix's remains elite's sport's most volatile journey of daring and dust. And the Hell of the North is the one race legend Tadej Pogacar still can't win.
articles.title: Paris-Roubaix: How a brutal race still thwarts Tadej Pogagcar

articles.description: With Arsenal desperate to banish their title-bottling demons, we look at the top 10 teams who have let Premier League leads slip.
articles.title: Bottlers? Ranking the biggest Premier League title slip-ups

articles.description: Tottenham are in advanced talks over a free transfer for Liverpool defender Andy Robertson this summer.
articles.title: Andy Robertson transfer news: Tottenham in advanced talks to sign Liverpool defender this summer
